posting.sponsorName: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Oswego)
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at the JATC office in Liverpool, online at baclocal2nyvt.org, or by mail during the recruitment period. Applications must be received by April 30, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Oswego), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers JATC #2 (Oswego), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13088
posting.applicationHours: Mondays through Fridays, from 8:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least six months before applying. Counties include Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Essex, Franklin, Fulton, Greene, Hamilton, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Montgomery, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, Rensselaer, St. Lawrence, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, and Washington.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes, and a valid driver’s license to operate company vehicles.
posting.classRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.
Must be physically able to lift 50-100 pounds.
Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have a valid driver’s license to operate company vehicles.
Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least six months prior to application.

Counties in the jurisdiction include Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Essex, Franklin, Fulton, Greene, Hamilton, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Montgomery, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, Rensselaer, St. Lawrence, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, and Washington.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, physically able to lift 50-100 pounds, have reliable transportation and a valid driver’s license, and live in the Local Union #2 jurisdiction for at least six months before applying.
posting.contactName: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Oswego)
posting.contactSummary: Contact the JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Oswego) at (315) 622-2081 for more information.
